languages.text: "Готов ли я?..." {n}На несколько секунд кажется, что вокс-связь прервалась, но затем Эоганн отвечает.{/n} "Нет. К этому невозможно подготовиться — такова жестокая наука, которую мне пришлось усвоить, Ваша Светлость. Однако же там, где все началось, все должно и завершиться: сбежать от судьбы невозможно, с ней можно лишь встретиться лицом к лицу, приняв неизбежное. Я должен увидеть творение своих рук и положить этому конец. Ведите".

"Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eogunn replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."
languages.original_text: "Готов ли я?..." {n}На несколько секунд кажется, что вокс-связь прервалась, но затем Эоганн отвечает.{/n} "Нет. К этому невозможно подготовиться — такова жестокая наука, которую мне пришлось усвоить, Ваша Светлость. Однако же там, где все началось, все должно и завершиться: сбежать от судьбы невозможно, с ней можно лишь встретиться лицом к лицу, приняв неизбежное. Я должен увидеть творение своих рук и положить этому конец. Ведите".

But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

"Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eo-gann replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

languages.text: “准备好了吗……？”{n}音阵连接似乎中断了几秒，随后传来伊奥贡的回应。{/n}“你无法为这种事情做任何准备——这就是我不得不领教的残酷法则，大人。但始于何处，必终于何处：命运避无可避，我们只能正面迎上。我必须亲眼见证我双手造就的一切，并亲手终结它。请带路吧。”
languages.original_text: "Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eogunn replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

traits.locale_text: “准备好了吗……？”{n}音阵连接似乎中断了几秒，随后传来埃欧-甘的回应。{/n}“你无法为这种事情做任何准备——这就是我不得不领教的残酷法则，大人。但始于何处，必终于何处：命运避无可避，我们只能正面迎上。我必须亲眼见证我双手造就的一切，并亲手终结它。请带路吧。”

languages.text: «¿Que si estoy listo...?». {n}Silencio. Tras unos segundos, la voz de Eogunn suena a través del voco.{/n} «No. Jamás podría prepararme para tal cosa; esa es la verdad más cruel de todas, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Pero esto terminará en el mismo lugar donde empezó. El destino es inexorable: hemos de enfrentarnos a lo que nos depara y aceptar que vivimos a su merced. Necesito poner fin a las consecuencias de mis actos. Adelante».
languages.original_text: "Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eogunn replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

traits.locale_text: «¿Que si estoy listo...?». {n}Silencio. Tras unos segundos, la voz de Eo-gann suena a través del voco.{/n} «No. Jamás podría prepararme para tal cosa; esa es la verdad más cruel de todas, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Pero esto terminará en el mismo lugar donde empezó. El destino es inexorable: hemos de enfrentarnos a lo que nos depara y aceptar que vivimos a su merced. Necesito poner fin a las consecuencias de mis actos. Adelante».

languages.text: « Si mes préparatifs sont terminés… ? » {n}Pendant quelques secondes, la liaison-vox semble s'interrompre, mais Eogunn finit par répondre.{/n} « Non. Il est impossible de se préparer à ce qui nous attend ; c'est le lot de la science cruelle que j'ai dû apprendre, Votre Seigneurie. Mais la vie est un cercle, et nul n'échappe à son destin. On ne peut que l'affronter la tête haute et accepter l'inévitable. Je me dois de constater les conséquences de mon œuvre et d'y mettre un terme. Passez donc devant. »
languages.original_text: "Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eogunn replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

traits.locale_text: « Si mes préparatifs sont terminés… ? » {n}Pendant quelques secondes, la liaison-vox semble s'interrompre, mais Eo-gann finit par répondre.{/n} « Non. Il est impossible de se préparer à ce qui nous attend ; c'est le lot de la science cruelle que j'ai dû apprendre, Votre Seigneurie. Mais la vie est un cercle, et nul n'échappe à son destin. On ne peut que l'affronter la tête haute et accepter l'inévitable. Je me dois de constater les conséquences de mon œuvre et d'y mettre un terme. Passez donc devant. »

languages.text: "Hazır mıyım..." {n}Birkaç saniyeliğine voks bağlantısı kesilir gibi olsa da ardından Eogunn cevap veriyor.{/n} "Hayır. Buna hazırlanmak imkânsız. Öğrenmek zorunda kaldığım acımasız ilim bu {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Fakat nerede başladıysa orada bitmeli: Kaderden kaçış yok, insan yalnızca kaderiyle yüzleşebilir ve kaçınılmazı kabullenebilir. Ellerimle yaptığım eseri görmeli ve buna bir son vermeliyim. Yolu gösterin."
languages.original_text: "Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eogunn replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

traits.locale_text: "Hazır mıyım..." {n}Birkaç saniyeliğine voks bağlantısı kesilir gibi olsa da ardından Eo-gann cevap veriyor.{/n} "Hayır. Buna hazırlanmak imkânsız. Öğrenmek zorunda kaldığım acımasız ilim bu {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Fakat nerede başladıysa orada bitmeli: Kaderden kaçış yok, insan yalnızca kaderiyle yüzleşebilir ve kaçınılmazı kabullenebilir. Ellerimle yaptığım eseri görmeli ve buna bir son vermeliyim. Yolu gösterin."

languages.text: "Bin ich bereit ...?" {n}Einige Sekunden lang scheint die Vox-Verbindung abzureißen, aber schließlich antwortet Eogunn.{/n} "Nein. Es ist unmöglich, sich auf das hier vorzubereiten. Das ist die grausame Wahrheit, die ich lernen musste, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Aber es muss enden, wo es begonnen hat: Niemand entkommt dem Schicksal. Man kann sich ihm nur stellen und das Unvermeidliche akzeptieren. Ich muss meiner Hände Werk sehen und ihm ein Ende machen. Geht voraus."
languages.original_text: "Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eogunn replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

traits.locale_text: "Bin ich bereit ...?" {n}Einige Sekunden lang scheint die Vox-Verbindung abzureißen, aber schließlich antwortet Eo-gann.{/n} "Nein. Es ist unmöglich, sich auf das hier vorzubereiten. Das ist die grausame Wahrheit, die ich lernen musste, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Aber es muss enden, wo es begonnen hat: Niemand entkommt dem Schicksal. Man kann sich ihm nur stellen und das Unvermeidliche akzeptieren. Ich muss meiner Hände Werk sehen und ihm ein Ende machen. Geht voraus."

languages.text: 「準備はできているか…？」{n}数秒間、ヴォックスリンクが途切れるように見えるが、その後、エオガンが答える.{/n}「いいえ。この事態に備えることは不可能です。残酷な科学を学ぶことになったのです。しかし、始まった場所では終わるべきです。運命から逃れることはできません。直面し、受け入れるしかありません。自分の手で作ったものを、止める必要があります。先を行ってください」
languages.original_text: "Am I ready...?" {n}For a few seconds, the vox-link seems to break, but then Eogunn replies.{/n} "No. It is impossible to prepare for this — such is the cruel science I have had to learn, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But where it began, there must it end: there is no escape from fate, one can only face it head-on and accept the inevitable. I must see the work of my hands and put a stop to it. Lead the way."

traits.locale_text: 「準備はできているか…？」{n}数秒間、ヴォックスリンクが途切れるように見えるが、その後、エオ・ガンが答える.{/n}「いいえ。この事態に備えることは不可能です。残酷な科学を学ぶことになったのです。しかし、始まった場所では終わるべきです。運命から逃れることはできません。直面し、受け入れるしかありません。自分の手で作ったものを、止める必要があります。先を行ってください。」
